text.title: Trunk-Based Feature Flags Procedure
text.summary: Five-step procedure from "we want a flag" to "flag retired". Each step has a decision-gate that blocks progression on unmet criteria.

step.name: draft-spec
step.action: Fill `templates/flag-spec.md`: flag_id (== ticket slug), owner_email (named human), type ∈ {release, experiment, ops, permission}, ramp_plan, cleanup_ticket_id (filed in same session), cleanup_sla_date.
step.decision-gate: If owner is a team alias OR cleanup ticket missing — STOP, the spec is incomplete.

step.name: wrap-code
step.action: Wrap the new code path with `is_enabled("<flag_id>")` checks. CI defaults the flag OFF; lint rejects `default=True` literals in checked-in code.
step.output: PR with the wrapper merged behind a closed flag.
step.decision-gate: If lint fires on default=True — STOP and fix.

step.name: test-kill-switch
step.input: flag service handle, wrapped code in trunk.
step.action: Flip flag ON to 0.1% in a controlled environment. Verify new code path is hit. Flip OFF. Verify legacy path is restored. Record the CI run id as kill_switch_test_run_id.
step.decision-gate: If kill-switch flip fails — STOP, fix routing before any ramp.

step.name: staged-ramp
step.action: Ramp per ramp_plan. At each stage: observe gate metric for the required window. Promote only if gate green; freeze or revert otherwise. Type=ops kill-switches may skip stages.
step.output: per-stage promotion log linked to the spec.
step.decision-gate: If any gate fails — kill-switch off, do not promote.

step.name: cleanup
step.input: flag at 100% for ≥ SLA window (30 days typical).
step.action: Open the cleanup ticket. Remove flag wrapper from code. Delete flag from service. Close ticket with link to commit.
step.decision-gate: If owner has >= 3 active flags past SLA, block new flag creation by that owner until backlog is paid down.
